2013June 3, 2013

🇫🇷 Saint-Denis, France

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Saint-Denis, France, June 3, 2013 -- June 8, 2013

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2013-06-st-denis-france

9 Resolutions

857Plenary
Place ISO 8000 parts 8, 9, 10, 20, 30, 40 on ISO extended timescale
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to inform ISO CS of the requirement to place ISO 8000-8, 9, 10, 20, 30, 40 on the ISO extended timescale.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
856Plenary
Appoint Standards Norway as administrative lead for JWG with ISO/TC 59/SC 13
SC 4 agrees that Standards Norway should take the administrative lead for the Joint Working Group, on the understanding that the first task of the JWG will be to create the operational procedures f...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
855Plenary
Harvest OMG SysML 1.3 and UPDM 2.1 under SC4 harvesting procedures
SC 4 welcomes the proposed submission from OMG of SysML 1.3 for harvesting as NWI/CD and UPDM 2.1 for harvesting as DIS under the SC4 harvesting procedures.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
854Plenary
Launch ISO 10303-210 edition 3 as new project on accelerated timescale
SC 4 approves an NP to create a new edition 3 of ISO 10303-210 with the same scope as ISO 10303-210 ed2, using the accelerated timescale, with Thomas Thurman as the project leader.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
853Plenary
Cancel ISO 8000-050 and remove from SC 4 work programme
SC 4 approves removal of ISO 8000-050 from the list of standards in the SC 4 work programme.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
852Plenary
Appoint Dr Gerald Radack as Coordinator, Quality Committee
SC 4 approves Dr Gerald Radack as Coordinator, Quality Committee for a period of three years, and thanks him for his willingness to serve in this capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its special recognition and thanks to Peter Benson for his exceptional dedication and service for the past three years in the position of Coordinator, Quality Committee.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its appreciation to those who presented at the Change Management Plenary: * ISO 8000 part 62 -- Ismael Caballero and Sunho Kim * SysML -- Andreas Korff, OMG * UPDM -- Andreas Korff, OMG
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its appreciation to Isabelle Rimbert, Stephane Mouliere, Ines Magnan and Martine Degardin for their hosting and support of the 65th ISO TC 184/SC 4 Plenary meetings at AFNOR in St De...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
